description: UI Spotlight — Five trending UI/UX patterns each day, recreated as live interactive demos
format: v2: each day has 5 drops in `drops` array; folder contains 1..5/index.html + gallery index.html

days.title: Magnetism, Marquees, Bento, Scramble, ⌘K
days.description: Five hot UI patterns from the design web — magnetic buttons, infinite marquee, bento spotlight, text scramble, and a command palette.

days.title: Scroll, Contain, Type & Reveal
days.description: Five native web platform patterns — scroll-driven animations, container queries, variable fonts, cursor torch, and native dialog animations.

days.title: Scroll, Liquid, Split & Snap
days.description: Staggered parallax reveals, CSS Subgrid magazine layout, character-split text, SVG gooey buttons, and a physics carousel.

days.title: Transitions, Filters, Liquid, Spring & Anchor
days.description: Five native web platform patterns: shared-element morphs, @starting-style filters, SVG liquid text, spring drag, and anchor-positioned segmented controls.

days.title: Springs, Clips, Paths, Fireflies & Popovers
days.description: CSS linear() spring easing, clip-path grid reveals, SVG textPath animation, canvas firefly trails, and the native Popover API.

days.title: Gravity, Scroll, Proximity, Glare & Accordion
days.description: Gravity mouse trail, sticky scroll reveal, variable-font proximity grid, CSS glare sweep, and a zero-JS animated accordion.

days.title: Orbits, Bentos, Gradients, Tilt & Counters
days.description: CSS offset-path planets, :has() responsive bento grid, @property gradient text, 3D tilt cards, and scroll-triggered counters.

days.title: Paths, Shapes, Distortion & Gravity
days.description: CSS scroll-driven SVG reveals, shape-outside layouts, feTurbulence text distortion, gravity trails, and :has() OTP inputs.

days.title: Cascade, Anchor, OKLCH, Expand & Toast
days.description: Five 2026 CSS features: sibling-index() stagger, anchor positioning, OKLCH relative colors, interpolate-size expand, @starting-style toasts.

days.title: Shaders, FLIP, Wave, Iridescent & Corners
days.description: WebGL-style scroll reveal, FLIP grid morph, dual-wave scroll text, iridescent cursor buttons, and the new CSS corner-shape property.

days.title: Scroll, Bento, Wipe, Magnet & Spring
days.description: CSS scroll cascade, subgrid bento cards, clip-path word reveals, magnetic buttons, and CSS linear() spring tabs.

days.title: Cubes, Masonry, Scramble, Springs & Transitions
days.description: Five live UI pattern demos: 3D scroll cube, CSS masonry, text scramble decode, spring drag, and View Transitions morph.

days.title: Blobs, Borders, Blur, Spotlight & Ghost
days.description: Gooey blob morphing, animated gradient borders, blur-stagger text reveal, spotlight card hover, and ghost autocomplete input.

days.title: Scroll, Scope, Aberration, Invert & Radial
days.description: Sticky scroll choreography, cross-DOM timeline-scope, chromatic aberration text, inverting cursor, and CSS trig radial menu.

days.title: Marquee, Bento, Flip Text, Gravity Cursor, Toast Stack
days.description: Five live UI demos: infinite marquee, bento hover-expand, 3D word cycler, gravity particles, and stacked toasts.

days.title: Cover Flow, Anchor, VF Scroll, :user-valid, base-select
days.description: Five cutting-edge CSS demos: scroll-driven cover flow, anchor-positioned popovers, scroll-driven variable font weight, CSS-native form validation, and styleable native select.

days.title: Scroll, Masonry, Holo, Ripple & Spring
days.description: Five live UI/UX demos: scroll-driven stagger, CSS native masonry, holographic type tilt, water ripple canvas, spring island nav.

days.title: Scroll, Bento, Glare, Magnet & Type
days.description: Five live UI demos: CSS scroll-triggered reveals, @property bento grid, variable font wave, magnetic buttons, and glare hover cards.

days.title: 3D Reveal, Editorial Grid, @property, SVG Cursor, details Accordion
days.description: Five live UI demos: 3D perspective scroll reveal, CSS grid editorial layout, @property gradient text, context-aware SVG cursor, native details accordion.

days.title: Grid Reveal, Container Queries, Variable Font, Elastic Snake, Island Nav
days.description: Five live UI patterns: clip-path product reveal, @container responsive cards, proximity variable font, elastic cursor spring trail, morphing pill nav.

days.title: Wave Grid, FLIP, Odometer, Displacement, Steps
days.description: Five live UI demos: CSS sine-wave grid, FLIP filter layout, digit odometers, SVG displacement hover, and animated progress steps.

days.title: Fluid Wave, :has() Grid, Neon Flicker, Rubber Band, Expand Cards
days.description: Five fresh UI patterns: SVG fluid wave morph, CSS :has() sibling reactor, neon sign flicker, rubber band elastic drag, and expandable cards with interpolate-size.

days.title: Scroll-Driven, Subgrid, Scramble, Tilt & Drawer
days.description: Five UI patterns: CSS scroll-driven animations, subgrid-aligned cards, text scramble decoder, 3D tilt+glare, and a spring-snap bottom drawer.

days.title: Blobs, Bento, Gravity, Magnetic & Palette
days.description: CSS blob morphing, glassmorphic bento grid, cursor-gravity typography, magnetic spring buttons, and a ⌘K command palette.

days.title: 3D Flip, Split Screen, Extrusion, Ripple, Split-Flap
days.description: Five live UI demos: scroll-driven 3D card entrances, diagonal split layout, CSS text-shadow 3D extrusion, click ripple rings, and a Solari split-flap board.

days.title: Stagger Cascade, Bento Spotlight, Gradient Flow, Glare Tilt, Morphing Text
days.description: Five live UI pattern demos: scroll stagger, cursor spotlight bento, @property gradient text, glare tilt cards, and blur morph words.

days.title: View Timeline, Liquid Glass, 3D Cylinder, Spotlight, 3D Carousel
days.description: Five live UI patterns: CSS scroll-driven entrance, liquid glass refraction, 3D cylinder typography, spotlight cursor, reactive 3D carousel.

days.title: Curved Flow, Sticky Stack, Char Reveal, Gravity Trail, Spring Sheet
days.description: Five live UI pattern demos: Bézier thumbnail flow, CSS sticky deck, per-character lift reveal, gravity particle trail, spring snap bottom sheet.

days.title: @property, Trig Spiral, Font Breath, Elastic Follow, Liquid Tabs
days.description: Five live UI demos: CSS @property rainbow chase, Fibonacci spiral grid, variable font breathing, elastic sticker cursor follow, and gooey liquid tabs.

days.title: Orbits, 3D Deck, Liquid Type, Springs & States
days.description: Five live UI demos: CSS orbital motion paths, 3D card fan decks, SVG liquid text, linear() spring easing, and multi-state buttons.

days.title: Scroll Reveal, Swiss Grid, Handwriting, Dock, Segmented
days.description: Pure-CSS scroll reveals, Swiss editorial grid, SVG handwriting draw-on, CSS :has() dock magnification, and spring segmented controls.

days.title: 3D Scroll, Subgrid, Thermal Text, Ink & Springs
days.description: Five live UI demos: scroll-driven 3D card entrances, subgrid editorial layout, thermal cursor text, CSS ink splash, and a spring radial menu.

days.title: Blur Cascade, Liquid Glass, Proximity Type, Liquid Cursor, State Button
days.description: Five live UI demos: CSS view-timeline blur cascade, Apple Liquid Glass cards, proximity variable font, spring blob cursor, and morphing multi-state buttons.

days.title: Card Stack, Grid-Lanes, Drop Caps, @starting-style, Tumbler
days.description: Five live UI demos: CSS scroll-driven card peel, native masonry grid-lanes, initial-letter drop caps, @starting-style enters, slot-machine digit input.

days.title: Aurora, Bento, Draw-On, Springs & Dialog
days.description: CSS @property aurora glow cards, :has() bento reflow, SVG text draw-on, linear() spring buttons, native dialog animations.

days.title: View Transitions, Anchor, 3D Text, interpolate-size & light-dark()
days.description: CSS View Transitions morphing, Anchor Positioning tooltips, 3D extruded text, height:auto transitions, and adaptive light-dark() theming.

days.title: Corner-Shape, Spiral, Proximity Type, Magnetics, Scroll-State
days.description: Five bleeding-edge UI patterns: scroll-driven corner morphs, CSS spiral layout, proximity variable font, spring magnetics, and scroll-state() sticky nav.

days.title: Motion Path, Masonry, Highlights, Composition & Field-Sizing
days.description: Five fresh CSS patterns: motion path orbits, native masonry grid, custom highlight layers, additive animation composition, and field-sizing content.

days.title: Wave, Coverflow, Orbits, Reveal & Progress
days.description: Five live UI demos: distance-stagger wave grid, CSS coverflow scroll, SVG text orbits, Fluent cursor reveal, and scroll-driven progress ring.

days.title: Stagger, Liquid, Type, Gravity & Popover
days.description: Five live UI demos: CSS sibling-index stagger, Liquid Glass SVG refraction, per-letter variable font hover, gravity mouse trail, and zero-JS popover menus.

days.title: Parallax, Masonry, Inflation, Rubber Band & Pill Input
days.description: Five live UI demos: scroll depth parallax, CSS native masonry, SVG feMorphology text inflate, elastic rubber-band snap, and spring pill tag input.

days.title: 3D Scroll, Anchor, text-box, Repulsion & Liquid Tabs
days.description: Five fresh UI patterns: scroll-driven 3D gallery, anchor positioning, text-box-trim, particle repulsion, and spring-morph liquid tabs.

days.title: Composition, Accordion, Font Weight, Cursor & Snap
days.description: Five live UI demos: animation-composition stacking, :has() grid accordion, scroll-driven font weight, shape-morphing cursor, scrollsnapchange carousel.

days.title: Depth, Subgrid, Warp, Particles & Spring FAB
days.description: Five fresh UI patterns: scroll-driven 3D depth reveal, CSS subgrid magazine, SVG turbulence warp, spring particle burst, and a radial FAB menu.

days.title: Lenticular, Depth, Slots, Springs & Morph
days.description: Cursor-driven lenticular reveal, frosted glass depth layers, slot-machine text roll, WAAPI spring entrances, morphing clip-path modal.

days.title: Scroll Triggers, Grid Lanes, Turbulence, Fluid Cursor & Anchor Menus
days.description: Five fresh UI drops: native scroll-triggered CSS animation, Grid Lanes masonry, SVG turbulence text, a WebGL fluid cursor, and zero-JS anchor-positioned menus.

days.title: Scroll Markers, Organic Bento, Living Ink, if() & Master Clock
days.description: Five 2026 CSS-feature drops: native ::scroll-marker carousels, shape() organic bento, random() jittered type, if() adaptive buttons, and a progress()-driven master-clock timeline.

days.title: Motion Paths, Magnifying Docks, Live Highlights & Native Selects
days.description: Five real 2026 web-platform drops: curved motion-path animation, a magnifying macOS dock, the Custom Highlight API, Interest Invoker popovers, and native customizable selects.

days.title: FLIP Grids, Drag Cubes, Shimmer Type, Momentum Reorder & Custom Elements
days.description: Five fresh UI drops: FLIP-animated filter grids, a drag-controlled 3D cube, sweeping shimmer text, spring-powered reorder, and a native Custom Element tab bar.

days.title: ASCII Fields, Split Panes, Ripple Type & Histogram Sliders
days.description: Five fresh UI drops: a mouse-reactive ASCII particle field, a resizable 3-pane workspace, a canvas water-ripple text distortion, ASCII/pixelate/glitch hover dissolves, and dual-handle histogram range sliders.

days.title: Directional Easing, Liquid Glass, Text Charts, Peel Reveal & Radial Menus
days.description: 5 fresh UI drops: interruption-aware easing, SVG liquid-glass refraction, text-to-chart typography, a peel-reveal cursor, and a radial marking menu.

days.title: Scrub, Style Queries, Balance, Mix & Native Carousel
days.description: Five live UI drops: scroll-scrubbed sprite animation, CSS container style queries, self-balancing typography, animatable color-mix() buttons, and a native ::scroll-button() carousel.

days.title: Orbit Flythrough, Reading Flow, Intrinsic Type, Paint Worklets & Shadow DOM
days.description: Five fresh 2026 web-platform drops: a WebGL scroll flythrough, CSS reading-flow accessible bento, container-fluid typography, Houdini paint worklets, and Declarative Shadow DOM components.
